title: Støv på hjernen
writer: Jørn Ording, Eva Ramm, Øyvind Vennerød
actors: Inger Marie Andersen, Odd Borg, John Aamdahl
plot: Randi Svendsen is happy. Her everyday life is about keeping windows, floors, and clothes cleaner than the neighbour's. Randi's friend Edna however got a different view on the values of life: "don't clean your husband out of the ho...
